basic_details.job_title: UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu PGT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
basic_details.short_information: UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) Notification 2026 has been released on 20 July 2026 on the official website https://daman.nic.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Upper age limit relaxable as per order/Guidelines issued by Central Government of India from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate from recognized University in respective subjects with at least 50% marks and B.Ed from NCTE recognized institution, OR Post Graduate with at least 50% marks and B.A.Ed/B.Sc.Ed from NCTE recognized institution, Medium of study in SSC should be English
qualification.details: Post Graduate from recognized University in respective subjects with at least 50% marks and Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) from National Council For Teacher Education recognized institution OR Post Graduate with at least 50% marks from recognized University in respective subject and B.A.Ed / B.Sc.Ed. from any National Council for Teacher Education recognized institution. Eligibility condition for medium specific teacher – The medium of study in SSC should be same as the medium in which they are applying.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://daman.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher Vacancy 2026 Details
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate from recognized University in respective subjects with at least 50% marks and Bachelor of Education (B.Ed) from National Council For Teacher Education recognized institution OR Post Graduate with at least 50% marks from recognized University in respective subject and B.A.Ed / B.Sc.Ed. from any National Council for Teacher Education recognized institution. Eligibility condition for medium specific teacher – The medium of study in SSC should be same as the medium in which they are applying.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Upper age limit relaxable as per order/Guidelines issued by Central Government of India from time to time.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://daman.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu Post Graduate Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the PGT Physics post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) position is 20-08-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the PGT Physics role?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Post Graduate degree with at least 50% marks in the relevant subject and a B.Ed. degree from an NCTE recognized institution, or a Post Graduate degree with at least 50% marks and a B.A.Ed/B.Sc.Ed from an NCTE recognized institution. The SSC medium of study must be English.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) position is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Central Government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the PGT Physics post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the PGT Physics post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 47600 - 151100 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the PGT Physics post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Post Graduate Teacher (PGT) (Physics) post will be based on a Written Test.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the UT Administration of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu, which is https://daman.nic.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.
